content: div id  attachment_587113  style  width  780px  class  wp-caption aligncenter   img loading  lazy  decoding  async  aria-describedby  caption-attachment-587113  class  wp-image-587113 size-full  src    alt  Event banner for AW 2026. Five leading humanoid robot developers from China will participate in the event.  width  770  height  498  srcset    770w,   300w,   150w,   768w,   368w  sizes  auto,  max-width  770px  100vw, 770px     p id  caption-attachment-587113  class  wp-caption-text  Five leading humanoid robot developers from China will exhibit and speak in Seoul. Source  AW 2026  p   div   p As humanoid robots continue to draw attention from global technology, investment, and industrial leaders, the  Big 5  humanoid developers of China will gather in South Korea for the first time next week.  p   p Smart Factory   Automation World  AW  2026, which described itself as  Asia s leading manufacturing AX expo,  announced that AGIBOT, Fourier, Huawei, Leju, and Unitree have confirmed their participation. The companies will exhibit and speak at the China Humanoid Robot Conference, or  China Humanoid  First Journey to Korea,  affiliated with AW 2026.  p   p  The gathering of world-class humanoid-robot companies in Korea goes far beyond a simple conference, marking the start of intensified global competition in the humanoid-robot market, with Korea emerging as a key hub,  stated the event organizers.  p   h2 Chinese humanoid companies to discuss global tech trends  h2   p  China is already recognized as a leading market for advanced humanoid robots, with pilot deployments and commercialization underway across the public, industrial, and service sectors,  the conference organizers noted.  The five companies visiting Korea for this event are core players in China s humanoid robotics industry.   p   p Jiang Chengyi, head of solutions at  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Unitree  a   Zhou Bin, co-founder of  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Fourier  a   and Ren Guangjie, head of solutions at  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Leju  a , will deliver keynote addresses. They will discuss  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  the country  a  s  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  humanoid  a  robotics strategies, commercialization roadmaps, and global expansion plans.  p   p  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  AGIBOT  a , which claimed to be the world s No. 1 company in global robot shipments and market share, plans to demonstrate its X2 and G2 humanoids. In addition, Unitree will show its G1, and Leju will show its Kuavo 4th Generation Pro and Kuavo 4 Pro robots.  p   p  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Huawei  a , a leading player in China s core technology development, will present real-world applications of its embedded humanoid robotics technologies.  p   p The academic community will also take part in the event. Yan Weixin, chief scientist at the Shanghai Jiao Tong University  SJTU   a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Institute of Robotics  a , will share insights from the Chinese robotics research hub and industry. In addition, Hyung-kwan Shin, CEO of China Capital Markets Lab, will deliver a presentation on  China s Humanoid Robot Industry  Current Status and Ecosystem  and will serve as the moderator of the conference.  p   hr     div style  text-align  center    a href     img loading  lazy  decoding  async  class  aligncenter size-full wp-image-568305  src    alt  SITE AD for the 2026 Robotics Summit save the date.  width  728  height  90      a   div   hr     h2 About the China and Korea conferences  h2   p The China Humanoid Robot Conference will be on Wednesday, March 4, the first day of AW 2026. It will be held from 1 00 to 5 30 p.m. in the Grand Ballroom on the first floor of Coex in Seoul. Paid registration is available through the  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  official event website  a , and the first round of early-bird tickets is currently on sale.  p   p AW 2026 will the largest one yet, taking place from March 4 to 6 across the entire Coex venue in  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  South Korea  a  s capital. The exhibition will feature 500 global smart manufacturing innovation companies and 2,300 booths, including   p   ul   li LS Electric  li   li Hyundai Glovis  li   li Rockwell Automation Korea Ltd.  li   li Schneider Electric  li   li Hyundai Movex  li   li Hyundai Motor Group Robotics Lab  li   li Doosan Corporation Digital Innovation BU  li   li CJ Olivenetworks  li   li POSCO DX  li    ul   p AW 2026 will also feature a new AI Factory Pavilion, the Industrial Digital Transformation Conference, the AI Manufacturing Innovation Forum, and a Machine Vision Seminar. In addition, it will include an Open Innovation Round, 1 1 Biz Matching, and networking programming.  p   p Free pre-registration is also available  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  online  a . The organizers include Coex, the Korea Industry Intelligentization Association, the Korea Smart Manufacturing Office, the Korea Machine Vision Industrial Association, Chomdan Inc., and the Korea International Trade Association.  p   p  iframe loading  lazy  title  AW 2026                  width  740  height  416  src    frameborder  0  allow  accelerometer  autoplay  clipboard-write  encrypted-media  gyroscope  picture-in-picture  web-share  referrerpolicy  strict-origin-when-cross-origin  allowfullscreen   iframe   p   p The post  a href    World in Seoul to feature Chinese humanoid makers  a  appeared first on  a href    Robot Report  a .  p
